name: GitHub Repository Secrets in Workflow Logs
description: Repository workflow may expose secrets in logs through echo or debug statements
conditions: content MATCHES 'echo.*\$\{\{.*secrets\.' OR content MATCHES 'print.*secrets\.' OR content CONTAINS '::debug::'
remediation: Remove debug statements that expose secrets. Use GitHub's secret masking. Never echo secrets directly. Use ACTIONS_STEP_DEBUG only in private repos.
